title: Prediction markets legal battles heat up in Minnesota, Rhode Island
summary: Kalshi sued Minnesota while the CFTC filed against Rhode Island as legal wrangling with state-level authorities seems likely headed to the US Supreme Court.

title: Bit Digital buys $20M worth of Ethereum, expands treasury to 158K ETH
summary: The purchase pushed the Nasdaq-listed company ahead of Coinbase Global to become the fourth-largest public corporate holder of Ether, according to CoinGecko data.

title: Asian Stocks to Rise on Firming US-Iran Sentiment: Markets Wrap
summary: Asian equities were poised to advance after gains in US stocks and Treasuries, as reports suggested Washington and Tehran were nearing an agreement to extend a ceasefire.

title: Oil Edges Lower at Open on Tentative Deal to Extend Iran Truce
summary: Oil edged lower after the US and Iran tentatively agreed to extend their ceasefire by 60 days, potentially allowing traffic to restart through the critical Strait of Hormuz.

title: Anthropic Nears $1 Trillion Valuation, Topping OpenAI After Fresh $65 Billion Raise
summary: Claude maker Anthropic said annualized revenue surpassed $47 billion as it expands cloud and compute partnerships.

title: AI Agents Are Learning to Predict What Users Want—Before They Ask for It
summary: Researchers in China built a model that uses an AI’s downtime to prepare for users’ next question before they ask it.

title: Gemini crypto exchange launches AI data feed powered by Grok
summary: The move comes as Gemini continues to expand beyond spot crypto trading into derivatives, predictions, and other financial services.

summary: Bitcoin holding structure continues to deteriorate as whale and dolphin BTC balances have stalled, CryptoQuant said.

title: Musk’s tweet undermines SpaceX’s claims about Anthropic data centre deal
